notableEvents.label: Gabriel Moreno GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Gabriel Moreno grounds into a double play, third baseman Junior Caminero to second baseman Richie Palacios to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Geraldo Perdomo out at 2nd. Gabriel Moreno out at 1st.
